  • Attic

Siegfried benchmarks

Mon, 18 Jul 2022 20:58:16 AEST

Environment

These benchmarks were run on a c3.small.x86 machine that was automatically provisioned.

Specs for the c3.small.x86: 8 cores @ 3.40 GHz, 32GB RAM, 960 GB SSD.

List of tools benchmarked
Tool Version
sf siegfried 1.9.4 /root/siegfried/default.sig (2022-07-17T20:35:48+02:00) identifiers: - pronom: DROID_SignatureFile_V106.xml; container-signature-20220704.xml
droid 2022-07-18T10:58:17,308 INFO [main] DroidCommandLine:140 - Starting DROID. 6.5 2022-07-18T10:58:18,383 INFO [main] DroidCommandLine:140 - Starting DROID. Type: Container Version: 20220704 File name: container-signature-20220704.xml Type: Binary Version: 106 File name: DROID_SignatureFile_V106.xml
fido FIDO v1.4.1 (formats-v96.xml, container-signature-20200121.xml, format_extensions.xml)

iPRES Systems Showcase

A corpus created for the 2014 iPRES conference comprising 2,206 files (5GB). Represents a range of formats, including AV and some uncommon types. Sourced from http://www.webarchive.org.uk/datasets/ipres.ds.1/.

Results
Tool Description Duration
sf Siegfried in its default mode (-multi 1). 20.344089405s
sf multi32 Siegfried with `sf -multi 32` (sf scans multiple files simultaneously). 8.492646744s
sf 64k Siegfried with `sf -multi 32 -sig pronom64.sig` (a buffer of 64k). 175.250511ms
sf 128k Siegfried with `sf -multi 32 -sig pronom128.sig` (a buffer of 128k). 194.727418ms
droid 64k DROID in its default mode (a buffer of 64K). 4.639627578s
droid 128k DROID with FIDO's default buffer (a buffer of 128K). 4.8067183s
droid nolimit DROID without a buffer limit (a buffer of -1). 17.974493555s
fido 64k FIDO with DROID's default buffer (a -bufsize of 64K). 8.710914451s
fido 128k FIDO in its default mode (a -bufsize of 128K). 9.99570571s
fido 1mb FIDO with Archivematica's default buffer (a -bufsize of 1mb). 15.676660373s

The tools differed in output for 403 files in the corpus. 15 of those differences are because of siegfried's use of a text identification algorithm and the following chart excludes those files.

Differences between tools

Raw output

Govdocs (Selected)

A selection from the Govdocs1 corpus comprising 26,124 files (31.4GB). Represents typical office formats, including approx. 15,000 PDFs. Originally sourced from http://openpreservation.org/blog/2012/07/26/1-million-21000-reducing-govdocs-significantly/.

Results
Tool Description Duration
sf Siegfried in its default mode (-multi 1). 4m13.725328422s
sf multi32 Siegfried with `sf -multi 32` (sf scans multiple files simultaneously). 1m8.508713279s
sf 64k Siegfried with `sf -multi 32 -sig pronom64.sig` (a buffer of 64k). 2.688811265s
sf 128k Siegfried with `sf -multi 32 -sig pronom128.sig` (a buffer of 128k). 3.393521287s
droid 64k DROID in its default mode (a buffer of 64K). 9.800946362s
droid 128k DROID with FIDO's default buffer (a buffer of 128K). 11.336778774s
droid nolimit DROID without a buffer limit (a buffer of -1). 1m2.432989853s
fido 64k FIDO with DROID's default buffer (a -bufsize of 64K). 1m38.216030417s
fido 128k FIDO in its default mode (a -bufsize of 128K). 1m52.380042484s
fido 1mb FIDO with Archivematica's default buffer (a -bufsize of 1mb). 4m51.495922222s

The tools differed in output for 7853 files in the corpus. 4746 of those differences are because of siegfried's use of a text identification algorithm and the following chart excludes those files.
